entries.title: move log export to its own section
entries.description: Moves the log export option into its own Diagnostics section so it is easier to find.

entries.title: make debug builds obvious at a glance
entries.description: Debug builds now show a marker in the header so they are easy to tell apart.

entries.title: unlock locked apps with screen lock
entries.description: A locked app now falls back to the device PIN, pattern, or password when biometrics are unavailable, and can optionally require a confirmation tap after face unlock.

entries.title: require biometric to open settings
entries.description: The app can now require fingerprint, face, or device credential before it opens, and shows an error or lockout message when authentication fails.

entries.title: add confirm before hiding launcher icon
entries.description: Hiding the app icon now asks you to confirm first.

entries.title: rework the locked-app unlock flow
entries.description: Simplifies the internal flow that reopens a locked app after authentication.

entries.title: relock when a task is removed
entries.description: Swiping a locked app off the recents screen drops its unlock, so the next launch asks for authentication again.

entries.title: reopen locked apps on the right screen
entries.description: Locked apps now reopen on the exact screen that was tapped, including deep links and non-exported notification targets, instead of restarting at the launcher.

entries.title: improve OEM and version compatibility
entries.description: Locked apps now prompt more reliably across different Android versions and OEM ROMs.

entries.title: capture more detail in log export
entries.description: The log header now records build type, ROM, and capture time.

entries.title: save logs to a file
entries.description: Logs can now be saved to the device in addition to sharing.

entries.title: skip unchanged keys on remote sync
entries.description: Syncing prefs to the hook now writes only changed values, so a routine app launch no longer wakes the hook once per key.

entries.title: add module-process logcat to log export
entries.description: The export now includes the app process's own logs, so biometric prompt failures show up next to the system hook activity.

entries.title: move log sharing into settings
cache root status in the scope viewmodel
regroup lock settings into behavior and privacy sections
announce disabled preference rows to accessibility
add Share logs to About screen
entries.description: Adds Share logs in About → Links to export module logs and diagnose issues. Debug builds produce more verbose output. Restart after updating for new hooks to take effect.

entries.title: prevent module uninstall
entries.description: Added a toggle to stop the app from being uninstalled

entries.title: re-lock apps when the screen turns off
entries.description: Turning the screen off forces every protected app to re-authenticate on its next launch regardless of its re-lock delay.

entries.title: match fingerprints across API levels
entries.description: Improve version compatibility so locked apps prompt below Android 16.

entries.title: use LocalWindowInfo for sheet gesture threshold
entries.description: The What's New sheet now sizes itself to the window, not the screen, so it works in split-screen and on foldables

entries.title: drop ApplicationInfo from AppItem
entries.description: AppItem no longer carries the full ApplicationInfo object for each row

entries.title: move binder and prefs to Application
entries.description: The service connection now lives on Application so it binds reliably on every process start

entries.title: drop the screen flash after biometric unlock
entries.description: Unlocking no longer flashes the home screen before the app appears.

entries.title: open the locked app when launching from a notification
entries.description: Tapping a notification for a locked app now opens it after you authenticate.

entries.title: clear unlock state when a locked app is removed or wiped
entries.description: Uninstalling, updating, or clearing data for a locked app now drops its unlock token so the next launch requires biometric authentication.

entries.title: link to the issue tracker from about
entries.description: The About screen now has a direct link to GitHub issues.

entries.title: spin the about screen badge
entries.description: The About screen badge now spins slowly.

entries.title: skip activity recreation on biometric unlock
entries.description: The post-auth relaunch now sends a full MAIN + LAUNCHER intent so Android brings the existing task forward instead of recreating its top activity.
